div.div:
svgseparator splits the SVG into individual shapes.
It's assumed the usual 'alpha over' method creates the complete render.
shapeify turns traditional renders into 1-bit colour/transparent cels.

switch.text: svgseparator splits the SVG into individual shapes....

div.font:
In 'web' mode:
BYTES data is embedded into PNG pixels.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
